features.name: GPS Tracking + Stats HUD
features.description: Real-time GPS with distance, time, pace, elevation gain

features.name: Race Route Map
features.description: 664-point GPX route on satellite MapKit with KM markers, water stations, POIs

features.name: Voice KM Alerts
features.description: Proximity-triggered voice announcements at each KM marker

features.name: 4 Switchable Themes
features.description: Dark Cyan, Dark Default, Light Coral, Spectator Dark
features.notes: Theme names need renaming to match website: Limestone, Mediterranean, Sunset, Terracotta

features.name: Elevation Profile Chart
features.description: Swift Charts area+line chart with runner progress marker

features.name: Race Countdown Timer
features.description: Live countdown to April 26 07:30, switches to Race is LIVE

features.name: Personalized Names
features.description: Runner shows as Mattie, spectator mode shows Fiona

features.name: Real-Time Spectator Tracking
features.description: Live GPS position shared to spectators via backend (Supabase/Firebase)

features.name: Cheer Delivery
features.description: Spectator sends cheer, runner receives haptic tap in real-time

features.name: Theme Rename
features.description: Rename themes to Limestone, Mediterranean, Sunset, Terracotta

features.name: Post-Race Completion Screen
features.description: Finish line celebration with summary stats

features.name: Shared Race Code
features.description: Spectators join via code to track the runner
